summary: The diff implements the majority of the requested requirements. REQ-54 (business name), REQ-55 (custom labor), REQ-56 (tax rate), REQ-57 (Google Review removal), REQ-58 (photo section), and REQ-59 (Stripe section) all appear to be addressed in the modified files. However, due to truncation of JobDetailPage.tsx and InvoicePreviewPage.tsx, full verification of several acceptance criteria is limited. One notable concern is that the Stripe createPaymentIntent call's amount argument (REQ-59 AC: post-tax total) cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff. Similarly, the complete photo section implementation (REQ-58) and the full PDF export content for REQ-56 cannot be fully verified. The file summaries corroborate that all features were implemented as described.
